metadata.description: Wave-based planning and parallel build orchestration for Claude Code. Entry point: /ai-lore.

plugins.name: ai-lore
plugins.description: decompose work into parallel waves of atomic tasks, build them with gated sub-agents, review the result across four dimensions, ship it, and document the codebase with parallel directory agents. Codebase-agnostic and config-driven.

plugins.name: statusline-metrics
plugins.description: Live session status line: context-window bar, spend, git repo/branch, cache-read, lines, duration, model. One fixed, deterministic look via a zero-dependency Node renderer; identical on every OS.
